name: air-mouse
description: Turn your phone into a wireless trackpad or air mouse for your Mac — scan a QR code, no app install needed

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: air-mouse
commands.title: Air Mouse
commands.description: Start the pairing server and show the QR code to connect your phone
commands.subtitle: Wireless Trackpad

preferences.name: workspaceDir
preferences.title: Air Mouse Server Directory
preferences.description: Folder containing mouse_controller.py. Leave blank to auto-detect (works when this extension is run from within the Air Mouse repo checkout).

title: Air Mouse
author: robert_bruhns
